custom.bindingNote: Bind to view.params.selectedAsset or asset selection session property.

props.text: ENERGY TIME-SERIES GRAPH — ACTUAL / FORECAST / CONFIDENCE

custom.bindingNote: Time-series graph: bind dataSources.energyPrediction to historian + ML forecast output. actual_kw = measured demand, forecast_kw = predicted demand, upper_kw/lower_kw = confidence band, tariff_limit_kw = demand threshold or peak demand alarm limit.

props.text: Blue = actual demand | Green dashed = ML forecast | Amber dashed = confidence range | Red dashed = peak limit

custom.bindingNote: Bind to forecast aggregate named query or ML inference output table.
Bind to model explainability output such as SHAP-style ranked drivers or rules-based contributors.
Dot green if required meter, weather, schedule, and production features are fresh.
Dot green if inference service is online and responding inside SLA.
Dot green for low risk, amber for medium peak risk, red for high peak or model confidence below threshold.
Bind to latest forecast generation timestamp.

props.text: 2. Pre-cool HVAC zone before predicted 14:30 peak.
3. Alert production if forecast exceeds 1.25 MW threshold.

custom.bindingNote: Bind recommendations to rules engine using forecast peak, tariff window, and controllable loads.
Bind to most recent model feature vector used for prediction.

props.text: HMI Strategy: actuals and predictions separated visually, confidence/risk visible near forecast, green = healthy/within target, amber = attention, red = actionable energy risk or stale model data.
Data freshness target: meter < 5s | forecast refresh 5-15 min | model metrics daily
